QF.id: Introduction to AML, CFT and Proliferation Financing_10

question.text: Financial Intelligence Unit - India (FIU-IND) was set up by the Government of India on which date?

explanation.text:
**The Logic:** FIU-IND was set up by the Government of India vide Office Memorandum dated 18th November 2004 as the central national agency responsible for receiving, processing, analyzing and disseminating information relating to suspected financial transactions.
**The Trap:** July 1, 2005 is when PMLA came into force — not when FIU-IND was established. January 1, 2002 has no specific significance. March 7, 2023 is when the PML (Maintenance of Records) Amendment Rules 2023 were notified.
**Cross-Exam Context:** FIU-IND is an independent body reporting directly to the Economic Intelligence Council (EIC) headed by the Finance Minister. This reporting structure is sometimes tested.
**Distributor's Pro-Tip:** FIU-IND receives CTRs, STRs, NTRs, CBWTRs, and IPRs from reporting entities. As a securities market intermediary, you are a "reporting entity" and must furnish reports to FIU-IND.
